race.comment: IHAVESEENTHELIGHT (6) ran a nice race first-up over today's distance at the Sunshine Coast then couldn't muster on the poly track more recently. Happy to forgive that last run. Back in his right race and is ready to peak at the third run back. BEE EXACT (7) went to the lead a fair way out but couldn't hang on when third last time out over 1350m at Ipswich. Will make his own luck up in front and in a race that lacks quality he will be very hard to reel in. MISHANI UNDERCOVER (15) is a lightly raced filly who broke her maiden last start in a tough display over this course and distance. Nicely in under today's scale so a repeat performance is not out of reach. WHISTLING SPIRIT (4) is back from a 317-day spell. Likely to need the run but on his day he is better than these so keep him safe. SEA WARNING (3) showed pace but dropped out over 1200m at Ipswich at his latest appearance. Might offer more resistance today with the blinkers going on for the first time.
